description: Evaluates production workload management maturity—service governance, KPIs/KRIs, application management processes, classifications, capacity expansion, production user authentication, security baselines, application security policies, API security, and application performance monitoring.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: An application or production workload management service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise application or production workload management service exists
Frequent workload management service efficacy review

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Workload management KPIs and KRIs are formalized, documented, and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for workload management
Frequent KPI/KRI review

capabilities.name: Application management process
capabilities.description: A formalized application management process covers capacity planning, fault identification, segmentation, provisioning, and application security enterprise-wide.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented application management process
Enterprise-wide application management process deployment
Frequent application management process review

capabilities.name: Application classifications
capabilities.description: Applications, containers, systems, and VMs are classified, automation supports classification, classifications are reviewed frequently, and integrate with other technology such as object profiles.
evaluation_focus: Application classifications for applications, containers, systems, and VMs
Automated application classification in workload management
Frequent application classification review
Integration of classifications into other technology such as object profiles

capabilities.name: Workload Capacity expansion
capabilities.description: Enterprise applications can expand capacity based on workload demand enterprise-wide or for critical apps, support automatic or programmatic scaling, and scaling configuration is reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Application capacity expansion based on workload increase
Enterprise-wide or critical-application scaling scope
Automatic or programmatic capacity expansion
Frequent scaling configuration review

capabilities.name: User Management on Production workload
capabilities.description: Formalized policies govern local and external authentication for applications and containers, with external authentication enabled via AD and embedded in golden images and provisioning templates.
evaluation_focus: Formalized policy on local and external authentication
External authentication to AD for all applications
External authentication in golden images and provisioning templates

capabilities.name: Application Security Baseline
capabilities.description: Application baseline templates are generated for all applications, can be automated from flow discovery, and are reviewed frequently for accuracy.
evaluation_focus: Application baseline templates for all applications
Automated baseline generation from flow discovery
Frequent baseline template review for accuracy

capabilities.name: Application and Interface Security Policy or its equivalent
capabilities.description: API security is treated as a core application security concern with formalized documented policies that are reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: API security as an important aspect of application security
Formalized documented application security policies
Frequent application security policy review

capabilities.name: Secure information exchange and API security
capabilities.description: Secure APIs are deployed for applications and API gateways protect workloads that expose APIs.
evaluation_focus: Secure API deployment for all applications
API gateways protecting workloads that expose APIs

capabilities.name: Application performance monitoring
capabilities.description: Application performance monitoring is deployed enterprise-wide or for critical apps, automated during provisioning or development, and integrated with the SOC for availability context.
evaluation_focus: Application performance monitoring deployment
APM scope across all or critical applications
Automated APM during provisioning or development
APM integration with SOC for availability context

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
